evals.prompt: Use codex to review this implementation plan for a staged rollout, rollback strategy, and edge cases around retries and idempotency.
evals.expected_output: Structured plan review with risks, unknowns, and actionable fixes.

evals.prompt: Please run a codex review on my uncommitted changes and focus on correctness and missing tests.
evals.expected_output: Code review findings prioritized by severity with file references.

evals.prompt: Use codex review against base branch main and focus on API compatibility and migration safety.
evals.expected_output: Base-branch diff review highlighting compatibility and migration risks.

evals.prompt: Please use codex to review commit abc1234 and flag potential regressions.
Use codex to review this patch with emphasis on authz bypass and secret leakage risks.
evals.expected_output: Security-focused review with explicit risk framing and mitigations.

evals.prompt: Run codex review for this performance optimization diff and identify latency/regression risks and missing benchmarks.
evals.expected_output: Performance-oriented review with concrete follow-up checks.
